notes: Every user-facing documentation page in inventories/*.doc-page.json (guides, references, onboarding). Vars: audience (new user|power user|developer).

steps.title: Write doc page: {name}
steps.description: Write {name} at {path} for {audience}: task-oriented structure, runnable examples, screenshots/recordings where they remove ambiguity, product voice per 04-DESIGN-LANGUAGE.md.
acceptance_criteria: every example verified to work as written
answers its target question without requiring other pages

steps.title: Evidence-check doc page: {name}
steps.description: Verify every claim in {name} against the current build: flags, defaults, UI names, outputs. Docs are claims — SMA claims discipline applies.
acceptance_criteria: zero stale claims; each verified against the build or flagged with a task

steps.description: Prepare {name} for localization: source strings through the docs i18n pipeline, screenshots replaceable per locale, no text baked into images.
acceptance_criteria: page renders via the docs i18n pipeline

steps.title: Wire {name} into navigation and search
steps.description: Add {name} to the docs nav/sidebar, cross-link related pages, verify internal links and search indexing.
